message:
chore(beads): append fresh-eyes audit progress comments to flywheel_connectors-2ot4f

Single-bead update: appends new audit progress comments and bumps
updated_at on the long-running audit bead
flywheel_connectors-2ot4f ([audit] fresh-eyes execution-path
audit across protocol, sandbox, and supervisor). No status change,
no other beads touched.

Bead state:
- id:     flywheel_connectors-2ot4f
- title:  [audit] fresh-eyes execution-path audit across
          protocol, sandbox, and supervisor
- status: open → open (unchanged)
- assignee: GentleOak (unchanged)
- updated_at: bumped to 2026-04-26T16:09:36Z

What was appended:
- New audit comments documenting in-progress findings on the
  WASI sandbox network-policy mismatch surfaced earlier in the
  bead (block_direct_network documented as forbidding direct
  outbound sockets but configure_network_policy still enabling
  preview2 TCP sockets when network_constraints are present),
  plus coordination fallbacks for cases where Agent Mail sends
  failed with transient DB errors.

What this commit does NOT do:
- Does NOT modify any other bead's status, priority, comments,
  dependencies, labels, or close metadata.
- Does NOT close the bead or transition it to in_progress —
  the parallel agent left it open while the audit continues.
- Does NOT change any source code; only .beads/issues.jsonl.

Verification before commit:
- git diff -U0 — only one bead id (2ot4f) appears in the patch
  (verified via id-extraction grep: every changed line is
  either the deletion of the prior 2ot4f line or its
  replacement with the comment-appended version).
- 1 line removed + 1 line added (JSONL is one-line-per-bead;
  the entire bead row is rewritten when comments are
  appended).

Co-author note: bead update emitted by parallel audit agents
in this session; committed verbatim per AGENTS.md's
"treat parallel-agent changes as your own" rule.
